text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho has been Tamamo Cross's
big goal for the first half of the year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And it's not just because it's an important race,
either. She has her own reasons for competing.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
HERE AT LAST! After all that dreamin' and
trainin', I actually pulled it off.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm finally runnin' in my dad's favorite race. The
only thing left to do... is win!
choice_data_list: Show them what you're made of!
Show them what you're made of!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I got this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm not the only one showing her support either.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Tamamo Cross! You've got this!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Make your family proud! We know you can do it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whoa there... You guys...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: All you guys are... cheerin' me on. Even though there's so many other amazin' Umamusume here today...

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: Of course we're cheering you on! We're your fans!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You're my fans... I... have fans...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I always thought the world was a cruel place.
But... guess there's a whole lotta good people out
there...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, I think I'm gettin' chills... but I gotta focus.
Time to clear my first big goal as a senior!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...You're quite the fan favorite, Tamamo.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: City? Oh yeah, you're runnin' too.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I don't really get this fan stuff. I mean, I'm
nowhere near as cool as you, City, so why're they
cheerin' me on?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Well, it makes perfect sense to me. Fans know
your roots as well, you know. It's the same as
fashion.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But I've got my roots as well. I don't plan on
losing here, Tamamo.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, bring it on, City! I'll give ya a taste of all
the stuff I've endured so far!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The contest Tamamo Cross's father holds so
dearly is finally about to commence!
